title: QAOA and Max-Cut Algorithms
description: Master quantum approximate optimization algorithms for the Max-Cut problem. Learn QAOA circuit design, parameter optimization, and performance analysis compared to classical approximation algorithms.
learningObjectives: Understand the Max-Cut problem and its NP-hardness
Implement QAOA circuits for Max-Cut optimization
Derive the QAOA cost and mixer Hamiltonians
Analyze QAOA performance at different circuit depths
Compare QAOA with classical approximation algorithms
Optimize QAOA parameters using various strategies
